dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "We need to teach Hadi a lesson for disrespecting us."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.line: "Agreed, he's been pushing his luck for too long."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAMMAD
dialogue.line: "I think I have a better idea. Why not challenge him to the annual car race? If he loses, he'll know his place."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAMMAD, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "You think you can beat us, Hadi? We've been training for months."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "I've been racing for years, you two are just amateurs."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.line: "We'll see about that. Let's see who's laughing at the end of the day."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAMMAD
dialogue.line: "Actually, guys, I think Hadi might have a point. We should focus on our own driving skills instead of trying to intimidate him."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of IQRASH, a fierce glint in her eye.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "I don't trust you, Hammad. You're just trying to get out of a fight."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAMMAD
dialogue.line: "I'm trying to get us to win, Haider. And I think my plan is the best one."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAMMAD, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAMMAD
dialogue.line: "Because I've been studying Hadi's driving patterns. He has a weakness in his braking technique."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAMMAD, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "Come on, Iqrash, you can do better than this!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.line: "I'm trying, Haider! But Hadi's driving like a pro!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "Ha! You two are no match for me!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.line: "Hadi, you idiot! You should have listened to us."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "I... I didn't mean to lose. Congratulations, guys."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.
